box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

pre.style: margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; break-before: page; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237)); text-align: start;

div.pre:
EncKDCRepPart ::= SEQUENCE {
key [0] EncryptionKey,
last-req [1] LastReq,
nonce [2] UInt32,
key-expiration [3] KerberosTime OPTIONAL,
flags [4] TicketFlags,
authtime [5] KerberosTime,
starttime [6] KerberosTime OPTIONAL,
endtime [7] KerberosTime,
renew-till [8] KerberosTime OPTIONAL,
srealm [9] Realm,
sname [10] PrincipalName,
caddr [11] HostAddresses OPTIONAL
}

pre.style: margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; break-before: page; text-align: start; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.pre:
Root CA cert {
subject: CN=Contoso-Root-CA
subjectPublicKeyInfo: <Root CA public key>
SubjectKeyIdentifier
: A1:B2:C3... ← "my key ID"
AuthorityKeyIdentifier
: A1:B2:C3... ← points to itself (self-signed)
signatureValue: <signed with Root CA private key>
}
│
│ Root CA signs the Intermediate cert
▼
Intermediate CA cert {
subject: CN=Contoso-Issuing-CA
subjectPublicKeyInfo: <Intermediate CA public key>
SubjectKeyIdentifier: D4:E5:F6... ← "my key ID"
AuthorityKeyIdentifier: A1:B2:C3... ← points UP to Root CA
signatureValue: <signed with Root CA private key>
}
│
│ Intermediate CA signs the user cert
▼
User cert {
subject: CN=Alice
subjectPublicKeyInfo: <Alice's public key>
SubjectKeyIdentifier: G7:H8:I9... ← "my key ID"
AuthorityKeyIdentifier: D4:E5:F6... ← points UP to Intermediate CA
signatureValue: <signed with Intermediate CA private key>
}
